name: Tsudakoma Corp.
summary: Tsudakoma Corp. produces and sells textile machinery and machine tool attachments worldwide. Its textile machinery comprises air jet looms, water jet looms, and preparatory machines; and parts include conversion kits for air jet looms and water jet looms. The company's machine tool attachments include NC rotary tables, machine vises, and manual tables. It also offers composite machinery, including prepreg slitters, automated fiber layup machines, auto-layup machines, multi-axial auto layup systems, auto edge welding machines, profile molding machines, carbon fiber rapier looms, and drape forming systems; and cast iron parts for textile machinery, industrial machinery, and machine tool attachments. The company was formerly known as TSUDAKOMA Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tsudakoma Corp. in 1982. Tsudakoma Corp. was founded in 1909 and is headquartered in Kanazawa, Japan.
